name: Window Property
desc: Updates a property of a window (e.g., furnace progress bar, enchantment levels).
notes: Furnace: prop 0=fire icon (fuel remaining), prop 1=cook progress (arrow), prop 2=max fuel burn time. Enchanting table: prop 0/1/2 = required levels for each option. Brewing stand: prop 0 = brew time.

implementation.overview: Updates window property (furnace, enchant, brew progress). Modules: AutoEnchant, AutoBrewer.
